result.summary: HashiCorp exposes HCP Terraform and HCP REST APIs plus the self-hosted Vault HTTP API, authenticated respectively with an HCP Terraform API bearer token, an HCP service-principal client-credentials bearer token, and a Vault client token sent as `X-Vault-Token` or `Authorization: Bearer`.

hcp_tf_api_token.label: HCP Terraform API token
hcp_tf_api_token.setup: In [HCP Terraform API tokens](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cloud-docs/users-teams-organizations/api-tokens), create a user, team, organization, or group API token from the HCP Terraform UI. HCP Terraform only shows the token once when you create it, so copy and store it securely. Use it as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.

hcp_service_principal.label: HCP service principal client credentials
hcp_service_principal.setup: Create a service principal and key following [Create a service principal](https://developer.hashicorp.com/hcp/docs/hcp/iam/service-principal#create-a-service-principal). Save the `client_id` and `client_secret`, then exchange them at `https://auth.idp.hashicorp.com/oauth2/token` with grant type `client_credentials` and audience `https://api.hashicorp.cloud` as described in [HCP API Overview](https://developer.hashicorp.com/hcp/docs/hcp/api). Use the returned bearer access token for API calls.

vault_token.label: Vault client token
vault_token.setup: Authenticate to your Vault using one of its auth methods to obtain a client token, as described in [Vault HTTP API authentication](https://developer.hashicorp.com/vault/api-docs). You can also log in with the Vault CLI via [`vault login`](https://developer.hashicorp.com/vault/docs/commands/login). Use the token as `X-Vault-Token: <token>` or `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.

nomad_acl_token.label: Nomad ACL token
nomad_acl_token.setup: Enable and bootstrap Nomad ACLs, then create or obtain an ACL token using the Nomad ACL system described in the [ACL HTTP API](https://developer.hashicorp.com/nomad/api-docs/acl). For CLI use, you can also authenticate with [`nomad login`](https://developer.hashicorp.com/nomad/commands/login) when an auth method is configured. Send the token to the API or CLI as the Nomad ACL token.

consul_acl_token.label: Consul ACL token
consul_acl_token.setup: Enable Consul ACLs and create or obtain a Consul token using the ACL system referenced from the [Consul HTTP API structure](https://developer.hashicorp.com/consul/api-docs/api-structure). Use the token as `X-Consul-Token: <token>` or `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.
